description: Input schema for Grok Imagine Pro image generation.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image content.
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: Optional input image for image editing. When provided, the model will edit this image based on the prompt.
image.title: Image

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated image. Use 'auto' to automatically match the input image's aspect ratio.
aspect_ratio.title: Aspect Ratio

title: AppInput
